text.bio: Passionate about programming, I have a strong background in various programming languages, including C#, JavaScript, PHP, Node.js, Java,and C++. Additionally, I am well-versed in web technologies such as HTML, CSS, and Bootstrap, enabling me to create attractive and functional user interfaces. My expertise extends beyond front-end      development, encompassing both relational databases like MySQL and      SQL Server, and non-relational databases like MongoDB. This     versatility has allowed me to tackle diverse and challenging      projects, providing efficient and effective solutions. I am always      on the lookout for new challenges and opportunities to apply my      technical and creative skills. If you are seeking someone who brings experience and passion to the team, I would be delighted to connect with you.

text.description: Here is some more info about myself to help you get to know me better.
text.name: Carlos José Acuña Aguaguiña

text.description: Throughout my journey, I've honed various skills that set me apart. These competencies have been the result of years of experience and continuous learning.

label.title: Portfolio
label.subtitle: Check Out My Work
label.description: Where is a small sample of my projects

projects.title: Sonibel Website
projects.description: The project consisted of developing a comprehensive online sales system for a music store, offering an intuitive and secure platform for both customers and the store owner. The application includes two main interfaces: the sales portal aimed at customers to explore and purchase musical products, and an administrative portal designed for the store owner to manage inventory, orders, and other key aspects of the business.

projects.title: Continental School Website
projects.description: The project involved the design and development of the institutional website for a school, providing a comprehensive and functional digital platform for the educational community. The website provides detailed information about the school, its mission, vision, and values, as well as relevant information about staff, curriculum, and extracurricular activities.

label.title: Services

items.title: Mobile Application
items.description: Development of mobile applications using hybrid technologies like React Native.

items.title: Cloud Solutions
items.description: Implementation of cloud solutions using AWS to offer hosting and secure storage services.

items.title: Consulting
items.description: Provision of consulting and technical advisory services for software development projects.
